releaseNotes: Removed legacy Google/GitHub routing fallbacks so permit routing uses state-authoritative sources.
Fixed Virginia EZ-Haul QR routes to load the complete official route geometry.
Added readable Virginia road-change waypoints on top of the official route line.
Preserved QR routing support for Texas, Colorado, Nevada, Virginia, and Illinois.
Improved session handling so approved users are not logged out by unavailable Firestore listeners.
Updated the alpha download site and in-app update release flow.
